info.name: HT-v7-CSH-CashInit-lbFixed-BiWeekly
info.description:
HT v7: BTC CLM Mirror Passthrough + Bi-Weekly Epochs + $1K Cash Reserve

ARCHITECTURE:
  CSH (CASH-RESERVE-SEED)  — ACTUS Cash contract. Initializes the portfolio
    cash reserve at $1,000. Always generates 0 events per ACTUS standard
    (confirmed: https://documentation.actusfrf.org/docs/examples/basic-contract-types/example_CSH).
    Its role is to establish the opening balance on the books that the
    CASH-PAM-1K then tracks event-by-event.
    Official ACTUS CSH attributes: statusDate, contractRole, contractID,
    currency, notionalPrincipal, creatorID, counterpartyID.
    All other attributes (contractDealDate, initialExchangeDate, maturityDate,
    premiumDiscountAtIED, calendar, businessDayConvention) are NOT applicable
    to CSH and caused the Failure status in v5/v6 runs.

  CASH-PAM-1K (PAM) — Tracks all cash movements against the $1K seed:
    - IED payoff = -$1,000 (initial outflow)
    - ad_btc01_mirror PP: receives dollar-for-dollar CLM BTC sale proceeds
    - lb_tr01: REMOVED from this contract (see below)

CHANGES FROM v6:
  1. lb_tr01 REMOVED from CASH-PAM-1K.treasuryModels
     Reason: lb_tr01 with minBuffer=$200K / targetBuffer=$350K applied to
     a $1K seed PAM causes it to extract ~85.7% of notional every bi-weekly
     epoch (confirmed from v5/v6 runs: drained CASH-PAM to $0 by Jun-30).
     The LiquidityBuffer model is designed for a treasury pool already funded
     above minBuffer. It is not appropriate as a monitor on the $1K seed receiver.
     lb_tr01 remains registered in the scenario for future use on a funded pool.

  2. Console script updated: CSH labeled as 'cash reserve initializer'
     with explicit 0-event confirmation rather than generic empty check.

EXPECTED CASH-PAM-1K BEHAVIOUR WITHOUT lb_tr01:
  IED      Mar-01 : -$1,000
  PP       May-15 : -$110,511  (mirror from CLM PP#1)
  PP       May-31 : -$112,070  (mirror from CLM PP#2)
  PP       Jun-15 : -$120,563  (mirror from CLM PP#3)
  PP       Jun-30 : -$99,304   (mirror from CLM PP#4)
  nomVal grows: $1K → $110,511 → $222,581 → $343,144 → $442,448
  MD       Aug-31 : $442,448  (cash reserve returned)

  Without lb_tr01 extracting, the mirror passthrough should work cleanly
  and dollar matching CLM PP = -CASH-PAM PP should hold at each active epoch.

exec: console.log('    13 bi-weekly data points Mar-01 → Aug-31');
console.log('    KEY: At May-15 alloc = 40×68000/10720000 = 25.37% > maxAlloc 25% → PP fires');
console.log('    Used by ad_btc01 denominator: alloc = positionValue / portfolioNAV');
console.log('    Used by lb_tr01 to validate cash buffer at each bi-weekly epoch');
console.log('    Used by lb_tr01 to net upcoming liquidity against outflows');
console.log('    Based on ACTUAL simulation output (4 CLM PP fires):');
console.log('    Feb-28 → May-14 : $1,000  (no drift breach yet)');
console.log('    Jul-15 → Aug-31 : $442,448  flat (no further breach)');
console.log('    NOTE: These are CLM proceeds via mirror, NOT CASH-PAM MD');
console.log('    CASH-PAM MD=$0 due to lb_tr01 extractions (see known issues)');
console.log('    Baked for future EarlySettlementModel invoice discounting');
console.log('    ACTION: At each epoch computes alloc, fires PP if breach, caches dollarPayoff');

item.name: 08 - Add AllocationDriftModel ad_btc01_mirror (MIRROR, NP=$1K, bi-weekly epochs)

exec: console.log('    positionQuantity    : 0.0 (mirror does not hold BTC)');
console.log('            Dollar-for-dollar: source sells $X BTC → CASH-PAM gains $X');

item.name: 09 - Add LiquidityBufferModel lb_tr01 (bi-weekly epochs, min=$200K target=$350K)

exec: console.log('    ⚠️  NOT attached to CASH-PAM-1K in this simulation');
console.log('    Reason: lb_tr01 with minBuffer=$200K on a $1K seed PAM');
console.log('    drains ~85.7% of notional every epoch (confirmed v5/v6 runs)');
console.log('    lb_tr01 registered in scenario for future funded-pool use');

item.name: 11 - Run Scenario Simulation (CSH fixed, lb_tr01 removed from CASH-PAM)

exec: console.log('HT v7: CLM MIRROR PASSTHROUGH + BI-WEEKLY EPOCHS + $1K CASH RESERVE');
console.log('CSH fix  : official ACTUS attributes only  |  lb_tr01: removed from CASH-PAM');
console.log('Response > 10KB — click Open to view full body');
// ── CSH initializer check (always 0 events per ACTUS standard) ──────
console.log('   Purpose : cash reserve initializer — seeds $1,000 opening balance');
console.log('   Events  : ' + (cshR.events||[]).length + '  (expected: 0 — ACTUS CSH generates no events)');
console.log('   ❌ STILL FAILING — check contractType dispatch with stripped attributes');
console.log('   status=' + r.status + '  events=' + evts.length + '  [' + cs + ']');
console.log('   [CSH] Cash reserve initializer: $1,000 opening balance. No events expected.');
var btc = (e.payoff / /* spot is embedded in NP reduction */ 1).toFixed(0);
note = '  ← CLM drift breach: $'+e.payoff.toFixed(0)+' BTC proceeds';
note = '  ← mirror: receives CLM proceeds into cash reserve';
// ── DOLLAR MATCHING: CLM PP vs CASH-PAM mirror PP ────────────────────
console.log('VERIFY: CLM PP = -(CASH-PAM mirror PP)  [lb_tr01 removed → no extraction noise]');
console.log('Total CLM proceeds (sum of PP fires) : $'+totalCLM.toFixed(2));
// Check for spurious positive PPs on CASH-PAM (lb_tr01 residual if still present)
console.log('⚠️  '+spurious.length+' spurious positive PP(s) on CASH-PAM (lb_tr01 still active?):');
console.log('✅ No spurious positive PPs on CASH-PAM (lb_tr01 removal confirmed)');
